text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ahhh, the debut race, where buds ofe-moe-tion sprout. I wonder howeveryone will fare...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Alas, amidst such pristine purity, this<n>bud called
Digitan is...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
At severe risk of overhydration! I'm<n>drowning in
moe! Look around,<n>Trainer! Everywhere you look,
Umas<n>abound.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Some shake with nervousness, while<n>others have
ambition sparkling in their<n>eyes...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Each of them is gripped by that eager
nervousness reserved for<n>inexperienced youth as
they prepare<n>to run their once-in-a-lifetime debut
race. What a divine occasion I find<n>myself mixed
up in!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Wheeze... Oh man, can divinity kill?Is this what it's like to be smitten? Sobe it... The heavens can smite mewhere I stand, and I'll die happ—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Gasp! That's right! I can't let theheavens take me yet!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
This is my time to stand with the other<n>fledglings.
If by any chance I were to<n>cast a shadow on this
precious day,<n>why I... I'd...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
No, I'll run! With this overabundance<n>of
sustenance, my power is unlimited.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
My eyes are cameras, here to<n>document this
once-in-a-lifetime<n>event! I will capture their tears of
joy<n>as well as their perspiration of<n>anguish and
burn the images into my<n>memory! Guehehe!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Underlying motives aside, Agnes<n>Digital heads off
to the race with a<n>bona fide determination that
can't be<n>ignored.
